message:
feat(tui): analytics surface responsive topology with AnalyticsTopology struct (1mfw3.4.6)

Add AnalyticsTopology struct controlling tab bar visibility, filter summary,
and footer hint density per breakpoint. Replace ad-hoc width check with
topology-driven logic. Add breakpoint label to analytics footer. Narrow mode
hides tab bar and filter summary to maximize content space. 5 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
